vocab.meaning: phản chiếu ánh sáng (làm căn phòng sáng hơn)
vocab.example: I opted for a massive wall-mounted piece specifically to reflect the light and brighten up my north-facing study.

vocab.meaning: lớp phủ chống xỉn màu/ố mốc
vocab.example: When shopping for a bathroom mirror, I made sure to find one with a tarnish-resistant coating to withstand the humidity.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế không đối xứng (phá cách)
vocab.example: I recently splurged on an artisan mirror with an asymmetrical design to give my hallway a more avant-garde feel.

vocab.meaning: kiểu dáng mượt mà và hiện đại
vocab.example: I prefer mirrors that are sleek and contemporary, without any bulky or old-fashioned frames.
I had to search several stores before finding a mirror with full-length dimensions that could fit into my narrow dressing corner.

vocab.meaning: khả năng phóng đại (gương trang điểm)
vocab.example: I bought a small desktop mirror with magnifying capabilities, which is incredibly handy for detailed skincare routines.

vocab.meaning: sự lồng ghép mượt mà (vào nội thất)
vocab.example: The frameless mirror I chose offers a seamless integration with the marble tiles in my bathroom.

vocab.meaning: chi tiết chạm khắc bằng tay
vocab.example: I stumbled upon a gorgeous wooden mirror with hand-carved detailing that perfectly matched my rustic furniture.

vocab.meaning: chiều sâu về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: The primary reason I buy mirrors is to add visual depth to my apartment, making it feel less claustrophobic.

vocab.meaning: hình ảnh phản chiếu bị biến dạng
vocab.example: I once bought a cheap mirror online, but I had to return it because it gave me a very distorted reflection.
